name: Hamburger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the hamburger and drain thoroughly.
2. Add onion, carrots, celery, and cabbage to the skillet.
3. Combine tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, and beef stock/bouillon in a bowl.
4. Transfer the mixture from the bowl to the crock pot with the hamburger.
5. Stir to blend everything together. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours, or high setting for 3 to 4 hours.
NOTE:
This is an updated version of an old chuckwagon recipe. They would use finely diced beef and the vegetables and let them cook all day at roundup time.
